channel.title: Drupal6 on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in Drupal6 on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: Drupal6 in EPEL
item.description:
Dear Drupal Community,

If any of you are interrested in getting a packaged version of Drupal 6 into Fedora’s EPEL repository (Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux) and therefore usable in RHEL and Centos,
please comment on the Bug I filed to get it’s introduction started.

Any pitfalls, benefits etc are welcome ..

thnx in advance !

item.title: ShareoMatic Drupal6
item.description:
As asked long time ago by different users I finally ported the Shareomatic module to Drupal6 .

Bug reports are welcome. as is an affordable bigger house.

Anyhow Enjoy !
